coverage: West Coast (Mumbai, Goa, Kochi, Mangaluru, Thiruvananthapuram)
East Coast (Chennai, Vizag, Bhubaneswar, Puri, Thanjavur)
Northern Plains (Delhi, Lucknow, Varanasi, Patna, Chandigarh)
Western Desert (Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Jodhpur, Bikaner, Udaipur)
Deccan Plateau (Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Pune, Nagpur, Jabalpur, Raipur)
note: v2.2 Income Loss Prediction model — predicts actual expected income loss, not just weather event occurrence. Trained on 35 diverse GPS zones across India. Key innovation: expected_orders_drop feature models gig demand decline from weather + time + zone signals. Lag features capture multi-day disruption dynamics. SHAP explainability shows WHY each premium was calculated. 5 automated disruption triggers with stochastic worker behavior noise. Output: loss_ratio (0-1). payout = predicted_income × loss_ratio.
